Apple___Apple_Scab: The leaf shows signs of Apple Scab. Remove infected leaves, improve air circulation, and use suitable fungicide if needed.
Apple___Healthy: The apple leaf appears healthy. Continue regular watering, sunlight exposure, and routine monitoring.
Bell_Pepper___Bacterial_Spot: The leaf may have Bacterial Spot. Avoid overhead watering, remove infected leaves, and keep the plant area clean.
Bell_Pepper___Healthy: The bell pepper leaf appears healthy. Maintain proper care and monitor for any early disease symptoms.
Grape___Black_Rot: The grape leaf may have Black Rot. Remove infected parts, improve ventilation, and avoid excess moisture.
Grape___Healthy: The grape leaf appears healthy. Continue regular care and monitor leaf color and texture.
Potato___Early_Blight: The potato leaf may have Early Blight. Remove affected leaves, avoid wet foliage, and consider appropriate treatment.
Potato___Healthy: The potato leaf appears healthy. Keep monitoring the plant and maintain balanced watering.
Potato___Late_Blight: The potato leaf may have Late Blight. Isolate affected plants, remove infected leaves, and seek proper agricultural treatment.
Rose___Black_Spot: The rose leaf may have Black Spot. Remove infected leaves, avoid watering leaves directly, and improve air circulation.
Rose___Downy_Mildew: The rose leaf may have Downy Mildew. Reduce humidity, improve spacing, and remove infected leaves.
Rose___Healthy: The rose leaf appears healthy. Continue normal care and check leaves regularly.
Rose___Rust: The rose leaf may have Rust. Remove infected leaves, improve air circulation, and avoid excessive moisture.
Rose___Sawfly_Slug: The rose leaf may show Sawfly Slug damage. Remove affected leaves and inspect the plant for larvae.
Strawberry___Healthy: The strawberry leaf appears healthy. Maintain good sunlight, watering, and regular observation.
Strawberry___Leaf_Scorch: The strawberry leaf may have Leaf Scorch. Remove damaged leaves and avoid water stress.
Tomato___Early_Blight: The tomato leaf may have Early Blight. Remove infected leaves, avoid overhead watering, and improve airflow.
Tomato___Healthy: The tomato leaf appears healthy. Continue regular care and monitor for changes.
Tomato___Late_Blight: The tomato leaf may have Late Blight. Remove infected parts quickly and avoid spreading moisture between plants.
